heading: Connection Rate Limits
body:
Atlas applies connection rate limits to protect cluster availability and
ensure optimal performance. These limits restrict the number of new connections
that each node in the cluster processes per second.

| Cluster Tier | Maximum New Connections Per Second Per Node |
| ------------ | ------------------------------------------- |
| M10          | 15                                          |
| M20          | 15                                          |

> **Note:** Connection rate limits apply only to `M10` and `M20` cluster tiers. Other cluster
> tiers don't have connection rate limits. Connection rate limits don't include
> connections from Atlas internal services.
>
> If the connection rate limit is exceeded, new connection attempts are queued,
> and if the period of overload is sustained, some connections are dropped.
> This feature helps maintain cluster availability by preventing connection
> overload on these cluster tiers.
